[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001000 1
1 00011010 3
2 00110011 4
3 11110010 5
4 01010010 3
5 01010101 4
6 11010101 5
7 10010010 3

56 65 00000010 1
67 76 00001000 1 match 0
